description: Unified enforcement engine — replaces preflight-gate + post-task-gate with a single state machine in SQLite

changelog.description: Initial contract: 4-phase state machine (PRE → POST → COMMIT → HANDOFF) with TTL-based sentinel, SQLite storage, and handoff.js integration

problem.statement: 4 separate enforcement systems (PFG, PTG, Memory, handoff.js) operate independently with no shared state. Sentinels get stale, checkpoints are skipped, and handoff.js has no integration with PTG.
identifiedFailures: F1: Sentinel has no TTL — stale sentinel from yesterday blocks today
F2: No hard enforcement — agents can skip oath entirely
F5: PTG checks JSON store, not SQLite (Memory v1 design)
F7: handoff.js has no PTG integration — contract says it should but never wired
F12: handoff.js CWD guard is fragile

enforcement_state.description: Single table tracking the lifecycle of every task through enforcement phases

columns.name: phase
columns.description: One of: PRE, POST, COMMIT, HANDOFF

columns.name: status
columns.description: One of: PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, PASSED, FAILED, SKIPPED

columns.name: oath_hash
columns.description: Hash of recited oath for provenance (PRE phase only)

columns.name: expires_at
columns.description: TTL: auto-resets to PENDING after this timestamp

pre.description: Phase 1: Record oath and create enforcement session
pre.behavior: Creates enforcement_state row with phase=PRE, status=IN_PROGRESS. Deletes old .preflight-passed if exists. Sets expires_at = now + ttl.
pre.exit0: Session created and ready for work
pre.exit1: Blocked (e.g., another agent has active session for same task)

post.description: Phase 2: Validate task completion — memory stored, temp cleaned, metadata valid
checks: PRE phase status is PASSED and not expired
Memory was stored for this task+agent (calls memory.js check)
No temp files in root or e2e/

commit.description: Phase 3: Validate commit message has required HANDOFF metadata
checks: Commit message contains HANDOFF, ARTIFACTS, CONTRACT, STATUS, MEMORY, PREFLIGHT, SCOPE fields

handoff.description: Phase 4: Execute handoff — update ORCHESTRATION.md, mark enforcement_state DONE
checks: All prior phases are PASSED in sequence
handoff.behavior: Updates ORCHESTRATION.md task status. Sets enforcement_state phase=HANDOFF, status=PASSED, completed_at=now.

status.description: Show current enforcement state for a task or agent
status.behavior: Queries enforcement_state table and prints formatted table

reset.description: Reset enforcement state for a task (admin only)
reset.behavior: Sets all phases for task to PENDING. Requires --force to confirm.

ciMode.description: When --ci flag is passed to 'post' command, skip non-blocking checks (memory storage, temp cleanup) and only validate commit metadata
ciMode.behavior: CI checks: HANDOFF metadata validation only. Does not require memory store or temp cleanup.

hotfixMode.description: When --hotfix flag is passed, all phases are marked SKIPPED and handoff proceeds without validation
hotfixMode.behavior: Logs HOTFIX in enforcement_state with reason. Requires explicit --reason flag.

rollback.description: If enforcer.js breaks, set AGENCY_ENFORCER_DISABLED=true to bypass all enforcement
rollback.behavior: enforcer.js reads env var and exits 0 for all commands (pass-through mode)
